column50: This is based on last fiscal year (FY 2023-2024), as that is how we report the data. Note that we combine data for all business rebates under Commercial. For residential, where there are zeros in demand, this is because it is in MW, and the demand savings are so low that the tool rounds down rather than going out that many decimal places.
